_comment: Example .claude/settings.json for integrating acts with Claude Code. Replace the path in the hook commands with the path to your acts binary or acts.js.

PostToolUse._comment: Optional: compress the output of known-verbose bash commands after the tool runs. See docs/mcp-integration.md for a more advanced setup using the archive.
PostToolUse.command: node /absolute/path/to/awesome-claude-token-stack/packages/cli/dist/bin/acts.js compress cmd git status < /dev/null 2>/dev/null || true
